---
title: "Helena Mary Heathcote"
---

## Helena Mary Heathcote

**Dates:** (12 March 1853-1925)

### Description

daughter of Sir William Heathcote

### Letters

- Letter from November 4, 1899.
- [To Helena Mary Heathcote, July 25, 1899](../letters/3413_To_Helena_Mary_Heathcote.html)
- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan, July 12th 1898](../letters/3379_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan.html)
- [To Helena Mary Heathcote, May 5 1898](../letters/3370_To_Helena_Mary_Heathcote.html)
- Letter from Aug 5th 1897
- Letter from Midsummer Day [21 June 1897]
- Letter from Jan 10th 1893
- Letter from March 26th 1882
- Letter from August 19, 1881
- Letter from December 30 [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
